content.problemStatement:
Declare two integer variables **x** and **y**, and assign 202020 to **x** and 666 to **y**.
Divide **x** by **y** (i.e., perform integer division **x / y**) and print the result.
content.outputFormat: Print a single integer – the result of integer division 202020 / 666.

sampleTestCases.explanation: 202020 divided by 666 using integer division yields 303.
Even without any input, the program always prints the constant result 303.
The computation is deterministic; the same output appears for every run.

solution.approach: The program stores the two given constants, performs integer division (floor division) and prints the quotient. No input is read, and the computation is O(1).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables.
